## Excerpt (first 6 000 chars, docx)

__*Website Comments*__

1. Logo font should match the font used on the buttons\.
2. Home buttons should be bold and capitalized\.
3. Text should be evenly aligned between margins\.
4. Heading fonts should be uniform and adopt the same font style used on the Home buttons\.
5. __About Us:__ Remove the phrase “__*photo coming”*__ under Secretariat\.
6. Remove the __*“Contact Secretariat”*__ option under secretariat\.
7. __Board of Commissioners:__ Remove the organogram and place it in downloads as a downloadable pdf file
8. __Services as an example__: Remove the full fee structure\. Everywhere written full fee structure remove it
9. On the __Downloads page__, be more specific about the document to be downloaded\. Avoid sending users to a general downloads page where they must search for the required form or document\.
10. Which email address is linked to the contact form\.
11. “__*Subscribe for Updates”*__ is not working; it redirects to __*Upcoming Events*__ under Vacancies\.
12. Press releases are not displaying or they are yet to be posted\.
13. __Magazine:__ Confirm whether content can be taken from the existing website\.
14. __Language__ option needs to be fixed and add the other official languages and allow people to select a language of choice\.
15. __WhatsApp link__ is connecting to the landline number ,instead of a mobile number 0719 299 150
16. Remove the __complaints form__ and only leave an option for __uploading documents\.__
17. Remove the __*“Go to Appeals”*__ link from the complaints section & remove the __*“lodge a complaint”*__ link from the Appeals Link\.
18. Notices should be displayed as a slideshow\.
19. Add the ability to upload event photos under photos\.
20. On FOIA can it just read __*FOIA Appeals*__ and remove “FOIA” from brackets and make it “__*FOIA Appeals*__”\.
21. Remove all text on FOIA and only leave __*download FOIA form and About FOIA\. *__Also,__* *__remove what happens after submission\.
22. Change Lodge Appeal Online to submit Appeal Form\.
23. Remove all text on the complaints link and only leave the submit a media complaint__*, *__Also,__* *__remove what happens after submission and what you can complain about\. Only add the text to be included in the chat bot\. __*The text is down below*__
24. Bottom ribbon on __*Zimbabwe Media Commission,*__ put in the organisational mission rather than the text displayed\.
25. __Secretariat,__ remove the caption __deputy secretary__ on the __principal director\.__
26. Secretariat photos to have a zoom option or click to view so that people are able to see, also increase the size of images\.
27. Rearrange the Secretariat under __management__ — start with:
28. Manager Procurement
29. Manager Research, Training and Development
30. Manager Human Resources
31. Manager Legal
32. Manager Audit
33. Registrar
34. Acting Chief Accountant
35. Then let those vacant post follow and remove the text photo coming\. 
36. __Service Charter__ to be added to the downloads page \(the document will be shared\)
37. Media Hub space \(online training\) to be added as a working space for upcoming online trainings — and indicate it is coming soon \(With the ZMC team will pursue the other system that patience shared with me yesterday like cognify system, l think it will be then integrated via the Media Hub link\. 
38. __Complaints tab__ to be renamed to __Media Complaints__
39. __Appeals__ to be changed to __FOIA Appeals__
40. On the logo change the message below written __*“promoting media freedom” *__and put in our vision below where it is written Zimbabwe Media Commission in the form of a running script like a slider
41.  ![](data:image/jpeg;base64,
